CustomField.description: Total times this series has run, including the original parent post as occurrence 1. Spawned rows are counted via Occurrence_Count__c (DLRS).
CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Series_Parent__c)), NULL, IF( OR(NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Recurrence_Frequency__c))), Series_Ended__c), BLANKVALUE(Occurrence_Count__c, 0) + 1, NULL ) )
CustomField.label: Total Occurrences
